text:
The `-c` (continue) flag resumed **our current conversation** — the one with 1,210 messages and 30+ user texts going all the way back to "I want to understand the design choices." It didn't start a fresh session — it continued THIS session. That's why it's so heavy.

Let me wait for it to finish, then send turn 3:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "RUN_DIR=$(ls -dt /tmp/claude_captures/run_* | head -1) && sleep 60 && PREV=$(ls \"$RUN_DIR\" | grep \"_summary.txt$\" | grep -v response | wc -l) && sleep 30 && CURR=$(ls \"$RUN_DIR\" | grep \"_summary.txt$\" | grep -v response | wc -l) && echo \"Was $PREV, now $CURR — $([ $PREV -eq $CURR ] && echo 'STABLE' || echo 'still running')\"", "description": "Check stability", "timeout": 120000}
